revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Deletedtext]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.text:
"'''$1'''" has been deleted {{toolbar|[[Special:Undelete/$1|view]]|[{{fullurl:$1|action=protect}} salt]}}. See the $2 for a record of recent deletions. {{ #ifeq: {{FULLPAGENAME}} | Special:MovePage || {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{TALKSPACE}} | User = | #default = {{ #ifexist: {{TALKPAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | image = none | text =
[[File:Ambox warning pn.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] This page also has a '''[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]''' {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|action=edit}} edit]|[{{fullurl:{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|action=delete&wpReason={{urlencode:[[WP:CSD#G8|G8]]: Talk page of a deleted page}}}} delete]}}. You may want to delete it as well – click [show] to view the contents.
__NOTOC__ {{fmbox warning ruler}} {{ {{TALKPAGENAME}} }}
}} }} }}{{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | Portal | Template |Module = {{ #ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{PAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | image = none | text = {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} |Portal = This page is the main page of a [[Wikipedia:Portal|portal]]. When deleting a portal, please make sure that you delete all of its subpages. |Template|Module = This template may have documentation or subpages that should also be deleted. }} Please review the lists of '''[[Special:Prefixindex/$1/|subpages]]''' and '''[[Special:Prefixindex/{{TALKPAGENAME}}/|talk subpages]]''' and delete any pages that are no longer required; you can use [[WP:CSD#G8|CSD criterion G8]]. }} }} }}

Maintenance links

Depending on the reason for deletion, you may want to remove any '''[[Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|links to this page]]''' {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|namespace=0}} articles]|[{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|hidelinks=1}} redirects]}}.
Relevant maintenance links: * {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion|Category:Candidates for speedy deletion}} {{toolbar | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion#Pages_in_category|all pages}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as attack pages#Pages_in_category|attack}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as spam#Pages_in_category|spam}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as nonsense pages#Pages_in_category|nonsense}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as importance or significance not asserted|significance}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as copyright violations|copyvio}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion by user|author request}} | [http://toolserver.org/~betacommand/reports/CATCSD.html oldest] }} * Entries related to speedy deletion detected by the [[Special:AbuseFilter|Edit filter]]: **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:removal of speedy deletion templates}}}} Removal of speedy deletion templates] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/29|filter 29]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=29}} edit filter log]) **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:very short new article}}}} Very short new article] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/98|filter 98]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=98}} edit filter log]) **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:large unwikified new article}}}} Large unwikified new article] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/180|filter 180]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=180}} edit filter log]) * [[Special:NewPages]] {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:Special:NewPages|dir=prev&hidepatrolled=1}} back of unpatrolled log]}} * [[Special:NewPagesFeed]] (page curation) * [[Special:RecentChanges]] {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|hideliu=1&hideminor=1}} anons]}} * {{purge|page=Category:Proposed deletion|Current nominations}} for [[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion|proposed deletion]], or the [[User:DumbBOT/ProdSummary|summary page]] * [[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion]] * [[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion/Old]] {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | File | Image = * [[Wikipedia:Images and media for deletion]] * {{purge|page=Category:Images with unknown source|Category:Images with unknown source}} * {{purge|page=Category:Images with no fair use rationale|Category:Images with no fair use rationale}} * {{purge|page=Category:Orphaned fairuse images|Category:Orphaned fairuse images}} * {{purge|page=Category:Images with no copyright tag|Category:Images with no copyright tag}} }}
}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text:
"'''$1'''" has been deleted {{toolbar|[[Special:Undelete/$1|view]]|[{{fullurl:$1|action=protect}} salt]}}. See the $2 for a record of recent deletions. {{ #ifeq: {{FULLPAGENAME}} | Special:MovePage || {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{TALKSPACE}} | User = | #default = {{ #ifexist: {{TALKPAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | image = none | text =
[[File:Ambox warning pn.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] This page also has a '''[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]''' {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|action=edit}} edit]|[{{fullurl:{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|action=delete&wpReason={{urlencode:[[WP:CSD#G8|G8]]: Talk page of a deleted page}}}} delete]}}. You may want to delete it as well – click [show] to view the contents.
__NOTOC__ {{fmbox warning ruler}} {{ {{TALKPAGENAME}} }}
}} }} }}{{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | Portal | Template |Module = {{ #ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{PAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | image = none | text = {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} |Portal = This page is the main page of a [[Wikipedia:Portal|portal]]. When deleting a portal, please make sure that you delete all of its subpages. |Template|Module = This template may have documentation or subpages that should also be deleted. }} Please review the lists of '''[[Special:Prefixindex/$1/|subpages]]''' and '''[[Special:Prefixindex/{{TALKPAGENAME}}/|talk subpages]]''' and delete any pages that are no longer required; you can use [[WP:CSD#G8|CSD criterion G8]]. }} }} }}

Maintenance links

Depending on the reason for deletion, you may want to remove any '''[[Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|links to this page]]''' {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|namespace=0}} articles]|[{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/$1|hidelinks=1}} redirects]}}.
Relevant maintenance links: * {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion|Category:Candidates for speedy deletion}} {{toolbar | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion#Pages_in_category|all pages}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as attack pages#Pages_in_category|attack}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as spam#Pages_in_category|spam}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as nonsense pages#Pages_in_category|nonsense}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as importance or significance not asserted|significance}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion as copyright violations|copyvio}} | {{purge|page=Category:Candidates for speedy deletion by user|author request}} | [http://toolserver.org/~betacommand/reports/CATCSD.html oldest] }} * Entries related to speedy deletion detected by the [[Special:AbuseFilter|Edit filter]]: **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:removal of speedy deletion templates}}}} Removal of speedy deletion templates] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/29|filter 29]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=29}} edit filter log]) **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:very short new article}}}} Very short new article] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/98|filter 98]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=98}} edit filter log]) **[{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|tagfilter={{urlencode:large unwikified new article}}}} Large unwikified new article] – detected by [[Special:AbuseFilter/180|filter 180]] ([{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchFilter=180}} edit filter log]) * [[Special:NewPages]] {{toolbar|[{{fullurl:Special:NewPages|dir=prev&hidepatrolled=1}} back of unpatrolled log]}} * [[Special:NewPagesFeed]] (page curation) * [[Special:RecentChanges]] the [[User:DumbBOT/ProdSummary|summary page]] * [[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion]] * [[Wikipedia:Articles for deletion/Old]] {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | File | Image = * [[Wikipedia:Images and media for deletion]] * {{purge|page=Category:Images with unknown source|Category:Images with unknown source}} * {{purge|page=Category:Images with no fair use rationale|Category:Images with no fair use rationale}} * {{purge|page=Category:Orphaned fairuse images|Category:Orphaned fairuse images}} * {{purge|page=Category:Images with no copyright tag|Category:Images with no copyright tag}} }}
}}
